title: festuca orientalis
intro: Festuca orientalis, also known as Eastern Fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca orientalis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, or used as a topical application to aid in wound healing.
